name: Astera Labs
confidenceReason: Pure-play on AI connectivity, PCIe/CXL retimers critical for AI server clusters.

screener.note: hasLikelyValueFloor: analyst upside 83.8% + QCS 12.14 (DEPLOY override: base CAGR 84% ≥ 20% and stabilized) (CYCLICAL EPS)

bullCase: Astera Labs makes PCIe and CXL retimers — the signal conditioning chips that enable high-speed connectivity in AI server clusters. As the only major standalone retimer vendor, it has design wins at Microsoft, Google, and AWS. The transition to CXL 3.0 memory pooling opens a new $5B+ TAM beyond the current retimer market.
bearCase: Astera is an early-stage company with limited revenue visibility. Marvell and Broadcom are developing competing connectivity solutions that could displace standalone retimers. Hyperscaler capex pauses would immediately compress Astera's revenue. Customer concentration at 2-3 hyperscalers creates binary revenue risk.
description: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure.
